use rayon::prelude::*;

// BAD: par_bridge on small or indexed collections
fn process_few_items() {
    let items = vec![1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
    // par_bridge overhead dominates for tiny collections
    let results: Vec<i32> = items.into_iter()
        .par_bridge()
        .map(|x| x * 2)
        .collect();
}

fn process_slice(data: &[u8]) -> Vec<u8> {
    // par_bridge on indexed slice where par_iter works directly
    data.iter()
        .par_bridge()
        .map(|b| b.wrapping_add(1))
        .copied()
        .collect()
}
